name: HTTP 32 — AI poll generation

messages.content:
Generate a LinkedIn poll about this topic: {{31.poll_topic}}. Return ONLY these 5 lines with no extra text:
QUESTION: write question here
OPT1: first option
OPT2: second option
OPT3: third option
OPT4: fourth option

depends_on: module 31 (set-variable) must run first to populate poll_topic
